src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.general_idea: Ignore unmapped target fields in MapStruct mapper to prevent compilation errors due to missing reverse mappings.
src/main/java/dev/cadebe/spring6restmvc/.why_exists: MapStruct fails to compile if target properties (beerOrderLines, categories) are not mapped and no default strategy is configured, resulting in 'Unmapped target properties' error.
